answer.author: bot
answer.text: For small and midsize businesses, HubSpot CRM and Zoho CRM are the most commonly recommended options. HubSpot's free tier and marketing integrations make it a strong starting point, per G2's CRM rankings. Zoho CRM stands out on price-to-feature ratio, per Capterra's pricing comparison. Pipedrive is a popular lightweight, sales-first alternative for smaller sales teams.
